statement.markdown: Given a sequence of integers representing a stack, implement a function to return the number of elements in the stack. A valid stack operation should be implemented to handle edge cases, such as an empty stack.
statement.inputFormat: Array of integers representing a stack
statement.outputFormat: Number of elements in the stack
statement.notes: Time complexity should be O(n), where n is the number of elements in the stack.

hints.text: Handle edge case where the stack is empty
